strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and open-source infrastructure with real-world deployment (GISCollective, DLang services)
Hands-on contribution to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, aligning with agentic AI architecture needs
Demonstrated engineering leadership across startups and scale-ups, with strong DevOps and CI/CD discipline
concerns: No explicit evidence of multi-agent AI systems in production fintech or regulated financial environments
Lack of documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Limited visibility into real-time inference systems, credit-risk modeling, or financial compliance infrastructure
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong technical depth in event-driven systems, distributed tooling, and emerging agentic frameworks, with relevant hands-on work at re:cinq; however, the absence of direct fintech infrastructure experience, regulated AI deployment, and proven leadership at scale creates significant gaps for this executive CTO role.
